requirement_topic.en: GSA mandatory conformity assessment — Certificate of Conformity, G-Mark and destination/pre-shipment inspection
requirement_topic.zh: GSA强制合格评定——合格证书、G-Mark及到岸/装运前检验
requirement_topic.zht: GSA強制合格評定——合格證書、G-Mark及到岸/裝運前檢驗

summary.en: Regulated consumer products imported into Ghana, including household refrigerators, fall under the Ghana Standards Authority （GSA） mandatory conformity assessment programme established under the Ghana Standards Authority Act, 2022 (Act 1078) and the Standards Authority's import-inspection mandate. In practice a refrigerator consignment must be supported by a GSA Certificate of Conformity （or pass GSA destination inspection） demonstrating that the product meets the applicable Ghana Standards （GS adoptions of IEC 60335-2-24 for safety, CISPR 14 for EMC, and IEC 62552 for energy） before it can be cleared. Depending on the route, conformity is evidenced through accepted international test reports plus inspection, and a conformity mark （referred to in some materials as a G-Mark） may be applied. Physical inspection occurs at the ports of Tema and Takoradi. The conformity assessment is bundled at clearance with the Energy Commission MEPS/label check and Ghana Revenue Authority （GRA） Customs procedures. There is no acceptance of a foreign certificate （e.g. China CCC） as a substitute for the GSA decision.
summary.zh: 进口至加纳的受监管消费品（包括家用电冰箱）纳入加纳标准局（GSA）依据《加纳标准局法》2022年（第1078号法令）及其进口检验职权设立的强制合格评定方案。实务上，冰箱货物在放行前须有GSA合格证书支持（或通过GSA到岸检验），证明产品符合适用加纳标准（GS转化的IEC 60335-2-24安全、CISPR 14电磁兼容及IEC 62552能效）。视路径而定，合格性通过被接受的国际检测报告加检验证明，并可加贴合格标志（部分资料称G-Mark）。实物检验在特马（Tema）与塔科拉迪（Takoradi）港口进行。合格评定在清关时与能源委员会MEPS/标签检查及加纳税务局（GRA）海关程序捆绑。外国证书（如中国CCC）不被接受为替代GSA决定。
summary.zht: 進口至迦納的受監管消費品（包括家用電冰箱）納入迦納標準局（GSA）依據《迦納標準局法》2022年（第1078號法令）及其進口檢驗職權設立的強制合格評定方案。實務上，冰箱貨物在放行前須有GSA合格證書支持（或通過GSA到岸檢驗），證明產品符合適用迦納標準（GS轉化的IEC 60335-2-24安全、CISPR 14電磁相容及IEC 62552能效）。視路徑而定，合格性通過被接受的國際檢測報告加檢驗證明，並可加貼合格標誌（部分資料稱G-Mark）。實物檢驗在特馬（Tema）與塔科拉迪（Takoradi）港口進行。合格評定在清關時與能源委員會MEPS/標籤檢查及迦納稅務局（GRA）海關程序捆綁。外國證書（如中國CCC）不被接受為替代GSA決定。

standards_or_laws: Ghana Standards Authority Act, 2022 (Act 1078) — GSA mandate for standards, certification and import conformity assessment
GSA Conformity Assessment Programme / Certificate of Conformity and destination inspection
GS adoptions of IEC 60335-2-24, CISPR 14 series, IEC 62552 (applicable refrigerator standards)
Ghana Revenue Authority (GRA) Customs Division — import clearance at Tema and Takoradi

summary.en: China's domestic equivalent is the China Compulsory Certification （CCC / 3C） regime administered by SAMR/CNCA, under which household refrigerators are a listed product requiring CCC certification before domestic sale. CCC certification bundles factory inspection, type testing to GB 4706.1/GB 4706.13 （safety） and GB 4343.1 （EMC）, and ongoing surveillance. The CCC mark is the domestic conformity mark. While CCC and GSA conformity assessment serve analogous gate-keeping functions, they are independent national schemes: a CCC certificate certifies conformity to GB standards for the China market and carries no legal standing in Ghana's GSA programme.
summary.zh: 中国的国内对应制度是市场监管总局/认监委（SAMR/CNCA）管理的强制性产品认证（CCC/3C）制度，家用电冰箱为目录产品，国内销售前须取得CCC认证。CCC认证整合工厂检查、按GB 4706.1/GB 4706.13（安全）及GB 4343.1（电磁兼容）的型式试验及持续监督。CCC标志为国内合格标志。CCC与GSA合格评定虽具类似把关功能，但属各自独立的国家制度：CCC证书证明对中国市场GB标准的符合性，在加纳GSA方案中不具法律地位。
summary.zht: 中國的國內對應制度是市場監管總局/認監委（SAMR/CNCA）管理的強制性產品認證（CCC/3C）制度，家用電冰箱為目錄產品，國內銷售前須取得CCC認證。CCC認證整合工廠檢查、按GB 4706.1/GB 4706.13（安全）及GB 4343.1（電磁相容）的型式試驗及持續監督。CCC標誌為國內合格標誌。CCC與GSA合格評定雖具類似把關功能，但屬各自獨立的國家制度：CCC證書證明對中國市場GB標準的符合性，在迦納GSA方案中不具法律地位。

standards_or_laws: China Compulsory Certification (CCC / 3C) regime — administered by SAMR/CNCA; household refrigerators are a listed product
GB 4706.1 / GB 4706.13 (safety) and GB 4343.1 (EMC) — type-test basis for CCC
CCC factory inspection and surveillance procedures

gap.en: A Chinese refrigerator cannot rely on its CCC certificate to enter Ghana. (1) Foreign certificate not recognised — GSA does not accept CCC as a substitute; a GSA Certificate of Conformity or successful destination inspection is required. (2) Test-report packaging — GSA generally accepts test reports against the GS/IEC standards from accepted laboratories, but they must be submitted through the conformity-assessment programme, referencing GS designations, and paired with inspection. (3) Port inspection — physical destination inspection at Tema/Takoradi means non-conforming or mis-declared consignments can be detained, re-exported, or destroyed at the importer's cost. (4) Bundled checks — clearance simultaneously enforces the Energy Commission MEPS/label gate and GRA customs, so a single failure (e.g. below-MEPS efficiency or missing label) blocks the whole consignment.
gap.zh: 中国冰箱不能依靠其CCC证书进入加纳。（1）外国证书不被承认——GSA不接受CCC替代；须取得GSA合格证书或通过到岸检验。（2）检测报告组织——GSA一般接受被认可实验室依据GS/IEC标准出具的检测报告，但须通过合格评定方案提交、引用GS编号并配合检验。（3）口岸检验——特马/塔科拉迪的实物到岸检验意味着不合格或申报不符的货物可能被扣留、退运或销毁，费用由进口商承担。（4）捆绑检查——清关同时执行能源委员会MEPS/标签门槛及GRA海关，故单项不合格（如能效低于MEPS或缺标签）即阻断整批货物。
gap.zht: 中國冰箱不能依靠其CCC證書進入迦納。（1）外國證書不被承認——GSA不接受CCC替代；須取得GSA合格證書或通過到岸檢驗。（2）檢測報告組織——GSA一般接受被認可實驗室依據GS/IEC標準出具的檢測報告，但須通過合格評定方案提交、引用GS編號並配合檢驗。（3）口岸檢驗——特馬/塔科拉迪的實物到岸檢驗意味著不合格或申報不符的貨物可能被扣留、退運或銷毀，費用由進口商承擔。（4）捆綁檢查——清關同時執行能源委員會MEPS/標籤門檻及GRA海關，故單項不合格（如能效低於MEPS或缺標籤）即阻斷整批貨物。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — GSA Certificate of Conformity and/or destination inspection required for refrigerator import clearance (Tema/Takoradi). Foreign certificates (e.g. China CCC) not accepted as a substitute. Bundled with Energy Commission and GRA checks.
mandatory_status.cn: CCC (3C) mandatory for domestic sale of household refrigerators; administered by SAMR/CNCA; no standing in Ghana

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Refrigerator import into Ghana requires a GSA Certificate of Conformity and/or successful destination inspection at Tema or Takoradi; a Chinese CCC certificate is not accepted as a substitute. Test reports against GS adoptions of IEC 60335-2-24, CISPR 14 and IEC 62552 must be submitted through the GSA conformity-assessment programme, and clearance simultaneously enforces the Energy Commission MEPS/label gate and GRA customs. Plan the GSA route and a registered importer before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 冰箱进口加纳须取得GSA合格证书及/或在特马或塔科拉迪通过到岸检验；中国CCC证书不被接受为替代。须通过GSA合格评定方案提交依据GS转化的IEC 60335-2-24、CISPR 14及IEC 62552的检测报告，清关同时执行能源委员会MEPS/标签门槛及GRA海关。出货前须规划GSA路径及注册进口商。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 冰箱進口迦納須取得GSA合格證書及/或在特馬或塔科拉迪通過到岸檢驗；中國CCC證書不被接受為替代。須通過GSA合格評定方案提交依據GS轉化的IEC 60335-2-24、CISPR 14及IEC 62552的檢測報告，清關同時執行能源委員會MEPS/標籤門檻及GRA海關。出貨前須規劃GSA路徑及註冊進口商。

requirement_topic.en: Registered in-country importer and economic-operator obligations for refrigerators in Ghana
requirement_topic.zh: 加纳冰箱在地注册进口商及经济运营者义务
requirement_topic.zht: 迦納冰箱在地註冊進口商及經濟運營者義務

summary.en: Ghana's import-control framework requires a locally registered importer to act as the regulatory counterparty for a refrigerator consignment. The importer must be a registered Ghanaian business with a Tax Identification Number / Ghana Revenue Authority registration, and is the party that lodges the import declaration, holds/presents the GSA conformity documentation, completes Energy Commission appliance registration and labelling, and is liable for non-conforming goods. A foreign manufacturer cannot self-clear goods into Ghana without this in-country economic operator. Unlike the EU （which provides for an Authorised Representative as a formal legal stand-in for the manufacturer）, Ghana relies on the registered importer/local representative model: the importer is the accountable entity for conformity, labelling, market surveillance follow-up, and any recall. This makes importer due diligence and a clear contractual allocation of compliance responsibilities essential for the Chinese exporter.
summary.zh: 加纳的进口管制框架要求由本地注册进口商作为冰箱货物的监管对接方。进口商须为持有税号/加纳税务局（GRA）登记的注册加纳企业，负责递交进口申报、持有/出示GSA合格文件、完成能源委员会器具注册与标签，并对不合格货物承担责任。外国制造商无此在地经济运营者不能自行清关进入加纳。与欧盟（设有授权代表作为制造商的正式法律替身）不同，加纳采用注册进口商/本地代表模式：进口商是合格性、标签、市场监督跟进及召回的责任主体。因此，进口商尽职调查及合规责任的明确合同分配对中国出口商至关重要。
summary.zht: 迦納的進口管制框架要求由本地註冊進口商作為冰箱貨物的監管對接方。進口商須為持有稅號/迦納稅務局（GRA）登記的註冊迦納企業，負責遞交進口申報、持有/出示GSA合格文件、完成能源委員會器具註冊與標籤，並對不合格貨物承擔責任。外國製造商無此在地經濟運營者不能自行清關進入迦納。與歐盟（設有授權代表作為製造商的正式法律替身）不同，迦納採用註冊進口商/本地代表模式：進口商是合格性、標籤、市場監督跟進及召回的責任主體。因此，進口商盡職調查及合規責任的明確合同分配對中國出口商至關重要。

standards_or_laws: Ghana Revenue Authority (GRA) Customs / importer registration and Tax Identification Number requirements
Ghana Standards Authority Act, 2022 (Act 1078) — importer obligations under conformity assessment
Energy Commission appliance registration — importer/dealer as registrant
Ghana import declaration / ICUMS single-window procedures

summary.en: In China's domestic market, the manufacturer or its domestic sales entity holds the CCC certificate and is the responsible party; there is no foreign-importer construct because the goods are domestically produced and sold. The closest analogue when comparing export obligations is that a Chinese exporter must, for nearly every destination, route goods through a destination-country importer of record. China imposes its own exporter/customs declaration obligations （e.g. customs registration, export declaration via China Customs/GACC）, but these govern departure from China, not entry into Ghana, and confer no Ghanaian regulatory standing.
summary.zh: 在中国国内市场，制造商或其国内销售主体持有CCC证书并为责任方；因货物为国内生产销售，不存在外国进口商构造。在比较出口义务时，最接近的类比是中国出口商对几乎所有目的地都须通过目的国进口记录人安排货物。中国对出口商/海关申报另有义务（如海关注册、经中国海关/海关总署GACC的出口申报），但这些规范的是离开中国的环节，而非进入加纳，且不赋予任何加纳监管地位。
summary.zht: 在中國國內市場，製造商或其國內銷售主體持有CCC證書並為責任方；因貨物為國內生產銷售，不存在外國進口商構造。在比較出口義務時，最接近的類比是中國出口商對幾乎所有目的地都須通過目的國進口記錄人安排貨物。中國對出口商/海關申報另有義務（如海關註冊、經中國海關/海關總署GACC的出口申報），但這些規範的是離開中國的環節，而非進入迦納，且不賦予任何迦納監管地位。

standards_or_laws: China Customs / GACC exporter registration and export declaration obligations
CCC certificate held by domestic manufacturer/sales entity (domestic responsible party)
No domestic foreign-importer construct (goods domestically produced and sold)

gap.en: The Chinese exporter must secure a Ghanaian importer of record before shipment. (1) No self-clearance — without a registered Ghanaian importer (TIN/GRA-registered) the consignment cannot be declared or cleared. (2) Responsibility allocation — the importer is legally accountable for GSA conformity, Energy Commission registration/labelling, and market-surveillance follow-up; the exporter should contractually define who funds testing, registration, label printing, and any recall. (3) No EU-style Authorised Representative — Ghana does not provide a formal manufacturer stand-in role; reliance is on the importer/local representative, so importer selection and reliability directly determine compliance outcomes. (4) Documentation chain — the importer must present the GSA conformity evidence and energy registration at clearance, so the exporter must transmit complete, GS-referenced documentation in advance.
gap.zh: 中国出口商须在出货前确定加纳进口记录人。（1）无法自行清关——无注册加纳进口商（持TIN/GRA登记）则货物无法申报或清关。（2）责任分配——进口商对GSA合格性、能源委员会注册/标签及市场监督跟进负法律责任；出口商应以合同界定由谁承担检测、注册、标签印制及召回费用。（3）无欧盟式授权代表——加纳不设制造商正式替身角色，依赖进口商/本地代表，故进口商选择与可靠性直接决定合规结果。（4）文件链——进口商须在清关时出示GSA合格证据及能效注册，故出口商须预先传递完整、引用GS的文件。
gap.zht: 中國出口商須在出貨前確定迦納進口記錄人。（1）無法自行清關——無註冊迦納進口商（持TIN/GRA登記）則貨物無法申報或清關。（2）責任分配——進口商對GSA合格性、能源委員會註冊/標籤及市場監督跟進負法律責任；出口商應以合同界定由誰承擔檢測、註冊、標籤印製及召回費用。（3）無歐盟式授權代表——迦納不設製造商正式替身角色，依賴進口商/本地代表，故進口商選擇與可靠性直接決定合規結果。（4）文件鏈——進口商須在清關時出示GSA合格證據及能效註冊，故出口商須預先傳遞完整、引用GS的文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — a locally registered importer (TIN/GRA-registered) must act as importer of record and regulatory counterparty for GSA conformity, Energy Commission registration/labelling and customs. No EU-style Authorised Representative; reliance on the registered importer/local representative model.
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable domestically — CCC held by domestic manufacturer/sales entity; China imposes only its own exporter/customs declaration duties on departure

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A China-based refrigerator exporter cannot self-clear into Ghana: a locally registered importer of record (TIN/GRA-registered) must lodge the declaration, hold GSA conformity documentation, complete Energy Commission registration/labelling, and bear liability for non-conforming goods. Ghana has no EU-style Authorised Representative, so importer due diligence and a clear contractual split of testing, registration, labelling and recall responsibilities are essential before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国冰箱出口商不能自行清关进入加纳：须由本地注册进口记录人（持TIN/GRA登记）递交申报、持有GSA合格文件、完成能源委员会注册/标签，并对不合格货物承担责任。加纳无欧盟式授权代表，故出货前进口商尽职调查及检测、注册、标签与召回责任的明确合同划分至关重要。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國冰箱出口商不能自行清關進入迦納：須由本地註冊進口記錄人（持TIN/GRA登記）遞交申報、持有GSA合格文件、完成能源委員會註冊/標籤，並對不合格貨物承擔責任。迦納無歐盟式授權代表，故出貨前進口商盡職調查及檢測、註冊、標籤與召回責任的明確合同劃分至關重要。
